owner_operator_stated: Site describes itself as a family owned and operated dental office with owners/partners Dr. Saleh Akhras and Dr. Rabeh Salamah, matching the record's practice name (Akhras, Saleh M DDS).
notes: Address (7124 W 83rd St Ste E) and phone (708) 261-0861 exactly match the record on the practice's own website. Single independent office, no DSO/multi-location mention. Attempted /careers.html (returned HTTP 400); no hiring page found.

Record address (4084 SW Hwy, Hometown IL 60456) matches exactly on the practice's own contact page, corroborating ownership; same practice name and single dentist (Dr. Amiel Pappas) throughout. Record's phone (708) 424-8110 differs from the phone shown on the practice's own current site, (708) 221-9483 (address match alone is sufficient per the corroboration rule, but flagging for awareness -- older aggregators like Yelp/CareCredit/WebMD still list 424-8110). No evidence of a different current occupant/owner at this address. No careers page found.

Record address (9055 S Roberts Rd) and exact phone (312) 909-6454 are documented across multiple third-party directories (DoctorsNetwork, FindATopDoc, ProviderWire, WebMD, Healthgrades) as belonging to Dr. Niki Demakakos-Kasper's practice, but no independently-owned website for her/that practice was found -- only aggregator listings -- and other listings place her current practice in Frankfort, IL, suggesting she may no longer practice at this Hickory Hills address. Separately, the SAME exact street address is confirmed on Signature Dental Care's own live website (signaturedentalcare.net/our-office/), a completely different-named practice with different phone numbers ((708) 598-4055 / (708) 215-2741). The business actually branded 'Hickory Dentistry' (per Yelp) operates at a different address (8071 W 95th St, Hickory Hills), not this one. Cannot corroborate a website for this record under its stated name; evidence points to address turnover to Signature Dental Care -- ownership conflict.

owner_operator_stated: justicedentalcenter.com lists Dr. Kassim Bazirgan as Founder/lead dentist at this address; no mention of the record's named entity (Dental Care Center Justice LLC) or of prior dentists Sienkiewicz/Beitz.
notes: Record address (8021 W 79th St, Justice IL 60458) matches exactly on justicedentalcenter.com, run by Dr. Kassim Bazirgan (site phone 708-634-4105). However, the record's exact phone (708) 458-7766 is documented by NPI Profile, Vitadox, Healthgrades, and CareCredit as belonging to 'Dental Care Center Justice LLC' (the record's named entity) with different dentists -- Roger E. Sienkiewicz DDS and Albert L. Beitz DDS -- also listed under aliases 'Dental Health Solutions' and 'Desplaines Valley Dental Associates' at the same address. This is an address-based ownership/successor conflict: the current live site represents a different named practice/owner than the record's named entity+phone. Justice Dental Center's own site shows one open General Dentist role on its careers page.

Record address (5501 W 79th St Ste 201, Burbank IL 60459) and near-match phone (708-424-5903 vs the commonly listed 708-424-5901) are documented only in stale third-party aggregators (Yellow Pages, PatientConnect365, Superpages, Facebook, AEDIT) as 'Universal Dental - Burbank' (matches vendor hint udclinics.com) with dentist Dr. Bara Abusharara. However, Universal Dental Clinics' own current official website (udclinics.com/our-location/) does NOT list any Burbank location -- it lists an 'Oak Lawn' location at a different address (9618 Southwest Hwy) using that same phone number (708-424-5901), suggesting the Burbank office has closed or consolidated into Oak Lawn. No independent 'Central Amazing Dental' website exists. No exact phone or address match found on any current, owned website -- treated as unverifiable.

public_practice_name: Premiere Family Dental (Adams Family Dentistry Ltd)
owner_operator_stated: Third-party directory (CareCredit) confirms the legal entity at this address as 'Adams Family Dentistry Ltd' with Dr. Sammy A. Elmosa listed as Owner, matching the record's practice name 'Adams Family Dental'; the site itself is branded 'Premiere Family Dental' (burbanksmiles.com).
notes: Record address (5600 W 87th St, Burbank IL 60459) and exact phone (708) 952-0000 both match exactly on the practice's own website, burbanksmiles.com, which brands the office 'Premiere Family Dental'; third-party listings (CareCredit) confirm this is legally 'Adams Family Dentistry Ltd,' consistent with the record's name 'Adams Family Dental.' The site also lists a second location in Chicago (4554 S Archer Ave), so this is a small 2-location independent group, not a DSO. Vendor hint (Othmanorthodontics.com) is unrelated/incorrect for this record. No careers/hiring page found.
